name: Veritate 200M (default base model, two-phase QAT)
description: Base model trainer at 200M. Vanilla byte-level decoder (vocab=256), tuned for TinyStories coherence. Two-phase QAT recipe: train fp/bf base first (qat_enabled=false), resume with qat_enabled=true for the last ~25% of the budget. Exports to a v9 INT8 binary that loads cleanly on the C engine.
